allow: PowerShell("=== ROOT ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @\('node_modules','.git'\) } | Select-Object Mode,Length,Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "=== APPS ==="; Get-ChildItem apps -Recurse -File -Depth 3 | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next|\\.turbo|dist' } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "=== PACKAGES ==="; Get-ChildItem packages -Recurse -File -Depth 3 | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next|\\.turbo|dist' } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell("=== ROOT ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @\('node_modules','.git','.turbo'\) } | Select-Object Mode,Length,Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "=== TREE \(src + key files\) ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path apps,packages,infra,.github | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next|\\.turbo|dist|tsbuildinfo' } | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\) })

PowerShell("=== STAGE 3 FILES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path packages/db | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.turbo|tsbuildinfo' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell("=== STAGE 4 FILES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path 'apps/web/src' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next|\\.turbo|tsbuildinfo' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell("=== STAGE 5 FILES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path 'packages/bnmp' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.turbo|tsbuildinfo|coverage' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell("=== STAGE 6 NEW FILES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path 'apps/worker/src' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.turbo|tsbuildinfo' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\) } | Sort-Object)
